zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Hemenway於1603年1月21日出生在英國越可爾布拉德福德時，他的父親Samuel Hemingway48歲，母親Ruth Copeland48歲。他於1634年7月5日與Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1678年6月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年75歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Hemenway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Hemingway  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Hemingway
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from an unidentified place, recorded only in the surname, but which was probably in Southowram (Yorkshire). The origin of the placename may derive from the Old English personal name Hemma + Old English connective -ing- or the groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + weg ‘way, path, road’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Hemenway was born on 21 January 1603, in Bradford, Yorkshire, England, his father, Samuel Hemingway, was 48 and his mother, Ruth Copeland, was 48. He married Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes on 5 July 1634, in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 June 1678, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Hemenwayが1603年1月21日にイギリスヨークシュアイアブラドフォードで生まれた時，父Samuel Hemingwayは48歳，母Ruth Copelandは48歳であった。1634年7月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーでElizabeth Holbrook Hewesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1678年6月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで75歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Hemenway(이)가 1603년 1월 21일 영국 요르크실르 브래드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Hemingway(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Ruth Copeland(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1634년 7월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이에서 Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1678년 6월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hemenway nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1603, em Bradford, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Hemingway, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Ruth Copeland, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes em 5 de julho de 1634, em Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1678, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Hemenway родился 21 января 1603 г. в местности брадфорд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Samuel Hemingway было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Ruth Copeland, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes 5 июля 1634 г. в местности роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 июня 1678 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
